Video.summary: Live from Bolton Arena in Greater Manchester, this Group A match at the English Nationals 2023 features Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf squaring off against Sebastien Malbois and Roberto Rospo. The teams bring a mix of controlled setups, powerful drives, and smart resets as they battle for an early advantage in the tournament.Expect sharp exchanges at the kitchen, tactical stacking, and impressive shot-making as both sides fight for momentum in this fast-paced men’s doubles opener.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Video.summary: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Oklahoma City Punishers in a men's match from June 2024.
Video.title: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mens) June Game

Image.alt: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mens) June Game
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mens) June Game
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mens) June Game

Video.summary: In Week 4 of Season 2, the Arizona Pickleball League brings another exciting Tuesday night match at The Orchard. This week, the Peoria Pythons take on the Surprise Stingers, with thrilling moments and intense competition. Featuring standout players like Ryan Trefry, Lauren Mercado, Michael Lloyd, and Nico Montoya, the teams face off in a high-energy battle. From dynamic mixed doubles to powerful gender doubles, every set and game keeps viewers at the edge of their seats. Will the Pythons maintain their momentum, or will the Stingers make a dramatic comeback? Don’t miss this action-packed match full of strategy, drama, and plenty of pickleball!
Video.title: Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya

Image.alt: Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya
Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya
Arizona Pickleball League 2023 – Week 4 – Trefry & Mercado vs Lloyd & Montoya

Video.summary: Freddie Powell and Louis Laville take on Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert in this critical Men’s Doubles Semifinal from the 2023 English Nationals. With a spot in the championship round on the line, both teams bring their A-game—mixing sharp shot selection, strategic court positioning, and high-pressure execution. Watch as these top British players battle through tight rallies and momentum swings in a must-see semifinal clash.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Week 3, Day 2 matchup of the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Liberty University facing Carnegie Mellon University. Liberty enters the match strong, having already secured wins in women's doubles. The broadcast highlights the Men's Doubles game where Liberty's Derek Kraje and Ben Rice dominate with a 11-6 victory, utilizing aggressive net play and strategic resets.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Liberty vs. Carnegie Mellon

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach at the NCPA Virginia Regional 2025, the University of Virginia (UVA) faces off against High Point University in a crucial pool play match. With a bid to the National Championship in St. Louis on the line, these teams battle through a best-of-seven format.The episode kicks off with Women's Singles featuring Alexandra McDonald (UVA) and Sushi Bandaru (High Point), followed by an intense Men's Singles showdown between Eric Lee (UVA) and High Point's wild card, Freddy Ortmann. The action heats up in Men's Doubles with Cooper Duncan joining Ortmann, and Aiden Eggleston partnering with Lee. Watch for strategic mixed doubles play and see if High Point can force a sudden death dreambreaker.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this fierce "Commonwealth Clash" features Virginia Tech taking on their in-state rivals, the University of Virginia (UVA). This pivotal pool play match is part of the fourth regional of the season, with teams vying for crucial seeding and a bid to the National Championship.The episode showcases intense action, starting with Women's Doubles, where UVA's Armelle Worrell and Mia Kim face off against Virginia Tech's Amelia Gaze and Heather Murphy. Later, watch the high-stakes Men's Singles match between Virginia Tech's Cody Miller, known for his reach and strategic placement, and UVA's Braden Cizek, who fights to keep his team in the series. With Virginia Tech leading 3-1 entering the singles match, every point counts.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Video.summary: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech takes on Utah Tech in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.
Video.title: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: Live from The Picklr in Noblesville, this NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 matchup features a critical battle between the University of Wisconsin-Madison and Purdue University. With eight national bids and $5,000 in prize money on the line, the stakes are high as the 16th-seeded Purdue takes on the 17th-seeded Wisconsin in a best-of-seven format.The match kicks off with Gender Doubles, where Wisconsin’s duo of Noah and Sarah Sowinski showcase dominant net play and quick hands against Purdue’s Caleb Yang and Trevor Ju. Watch for standout moments, including an incredible Ernie from Wisconsin and strategic adjustments in the Mixed Doubles games involving Colton Thielman and Elena Schlichte.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Video.summary: Marcello Jardim and Marco Osorio go head-to-head in the Gold Medal Match of the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With power, precision, and nonstop intensity, this Men’s Pro Singles final showcases top-tier talent and a dramatic battle for the championship title.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: Lee Whitwell and Andrei Daescu take on Patrick Cote and Susannah Barr in this Mixed Pro Split Age Quarterfinal.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Quarterfinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg take on Martina Frantova and Christine Karges in this Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal match at the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With fast-paced exchanges, sharp angles, and tactical precision, both teams battle for a spot in the finals on the prestigious Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida. This high-stakes match features standout teamwork and thrilling rallies from some of the sport’s most skilled competitors.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges
US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges
US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges

Video.summary: In this thrilling gold medal match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Dylan Frazier and Altaf Merchant take on defending champions Andrei Daescu and Dave Weinbach in the Men’s Split Pro Doubles division. The action heats up fast as Frazier and Merchant dominate early, only to be met with a fierce comeback from Daescu and Weinbach in game two. Momentum swings, net-cord drama, and tactical shifts lead to an electrifying third game where every point counts.From Frazier’s lightning-fast hands to Daescu’s towering net play, this match showcases elite shot-making, sharp strategy, and high emotion on Championship Court. With the crowd on edge and the gold medal on the line, it’s a true masterclass in professional pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Video.summary: Pei-chuan Kao and Mari Humberg face off in the US Open Pickleball Championship's Women's Pro Singles backdraw quarterfinals.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Backdraw Quarterfinals

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Backdraw Quarterfinals
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Backdraw Quarterfinals

Video.summary: Live from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome, Italy, witness back-to-back high-stakes matchups. First, in Women's Doubles Open, Team England’s Thaddea Lock and Katie Morris face off against Team France’s Elodie Busson and Adeline Nguyen. In a "nip and tuck" group decider, both teams trade aggressive volleys and "shake and bake" attacks before England finds a tactical edge to break the deadlock.
Video.title: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Image.alt: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Video.summary: Indiana’s Safdar faces Clemson’s Bozzetto in the 2024 DUPR National Championship Women’s Singles Final, battling for collegiate pickleball supremacy in a best-of-three format.
Video.title: Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson

Image.alt: Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson

Video.summary: Watch a thrilling Mixed Pro Doubles pickleball match between the top-seeded team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro against Peichuan Kao and Ryler DeHeart. Megan Fudge is a highly-ranked professional player who previously played tennis at the University of Illinois, where she met her husband and partner, Ryler DeHeart. DeHeart is a former professional tennis player who is left-handed. Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1

Video.summary: Championship Court hosts a star-studded final as brothers Ben and Collin Johns take on Matt Wright and Riley Newman in this Men’s Pro Doubles finale. Packed with elite strategy, blistering hand battles, and dramatic swings, this is top-tier pickleball at its most intense.
Video.title: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman

Image.alt: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
